headline: Oppenheimer Reaffirms Bullish Outlook on ServiceNow (NOW) Amid AI Growth and Cognizant Partnership
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) ranks among the best set-it-and-forget-it stocks to buy right now. Following a discussion with ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) management, Oppenheimer reiterated its Outperform rating and $130 price target for ServiceNow on June 10. The conversation left the firm slightly optimistic about ServiceNow’s second-half 2026 prospects and the likelihood of business reacceleration in the […]
